title: Solana ID
summary: Solana ID is an identity and perks layer built around wallet activity. Arcium includes it in the consumer-app ecosystem, but the public Solana ID materials I reviewed do not document a specific Arcium-powered feature.
description:
Solana ID describes itself as a product built for users to take advantage of their wallet activity. Public materials focus on identity-linked perks, user benefits, and credential-like experiences rooted in on-chain participation.

Arcium includes Solana ID in the encrypted consumer-app ecosystem. That supports inclusion in Atlas, but I did not find a current Solana ID page documenting a specific Arcium-powered module.

bodySections.title: What_Atlas_Reviewed
bodySections.body: Solana ID is relevant because identity, perks, and credential logic often require a mix of personalization and privacy. Atlas should track products like this closely because they are natural candidates for selective disclosure and encrypted user-state patterns.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Solana ID among consumer-app ecosystem partners. That is enough for ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a current Solana ID implementation page describing a clearly Arcium-powered feature.

statusNote: Arcium includes Solana ID in its consumer-app ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a current Solana ID page documenting a specific Arcium-powered feature.

sources.label: Solana ID Website
sources.note: Official site describing Solana ID as a wallet-activity-based perks platform.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
sources.note: Arcium lists Solana ID among consumer-app ecosystem partners.
